news.summary: Rosemont, Illinois will be home to EXP, an Entertainment Innovation Hub set to launch in Fall 2025. Renowned Montréal-based immersive arts innovator, PHI Studio, will showcase their Horizon of Khufu and Life Chronicles exhibits at the hub. This launch marks a significant development for the entertainment industry, with the hub set to attract attention from global audiences. The event is scheduled for June 27, 2025, with exposure expected to reach a wide audience as the studio unveils these cutting-edge experiences in a new setting.
news.headline: PHI Studio to showcase 2 immersive experiences at EXP in Fall 2025, Rosemont, IL. Innovating in arts and entertainment.

news.summary: The founders of Across Protocol are facing accusations of manipulating DAO governance in order to direct $23 million worth of tokens to their associated for-profit business, Risk Labs.
news.headline: Allegations of $23M fund misuse surface against Across Protocol DAO founders for diverting tokens to Risk Labs.

news.summary: Monster Energy is set to mark the 30th anniversary of X Games with a thrilling lineup of BMX, Moto X, and Skateboard icons. The action-packed X Games Salt Lake City 2025 event kicks off at the Utah State Fairpark and Event on June 27th. The event promises to be a high-octane showcase of extreme sports talent, with a series of heart-stopping performances by legendary athletes. Stay tuned for a weekend full of excitement as these sports legends take on the challenge, celebrating three decades of X Games in style.
news.headline: Monster Energy reveals top athletes for X Games Salt Lake City 2025, marking 30 years of X Games. High-octane riders in BMX, Moto X, and Skateboard. Utah State Fairpark hosts the event.

news.summary: TAMPA, Fla.--RHI Magnesita and BPI, Inc. are collaborating on a joint venture aimed at improving sustainability practices within the refractories and raw material production sectors in North America. This partnership signals a commitment to environmental responsibility and efficiency in these industries. The collaboration brings together the expertise and resources of both companies to drive positive change in the region. The venture is expected to have a significant impact on reducing carbon footprint and enhancing overall sustainability.
news.headline: RHI Magnesita and BPI, Inc. partner for sustainable growth in refractories and raw materials in North America.

news.summary: The Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP) of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) voted with a five-to-two majority to recommend Merck & Co Inc's Enflonsia (clesrovimab-cfor) for preventing respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) lower respiratory tract disease in infants under 8 months old during or entering their first RSV season. This decision was the first by the newly formed committee chaired by RFK Jr., who completely revamped the 17-member panel with his own appointees. Additionally, the ACIP agreed to include Enflonsia in the Vaccines for Children Program, enhancing access to this preventive option.
news.headline: CDC panel recommends Merck's RSV shot for infants under 8 months. RFK Jr's majority vote. Enflonsia included in VFC Program.

news.summary: Based in Hong Kong and established in 2021, SignalPlus is a renowned provider of trading software and infrastructure in the industry. news.headline: SignalPlus is a top trading software provider founded in 2021 in Hong Kong, offering advanced analytical tools for options.

news.headline: Xiaomi debuts YU7 SUV with Ambilight's smart dimming sunroof in China. YU7 MAX model leads with cutting-edge features.

news.summary: In Singapore on June 27, 2025, FBS, a top global broker, published a recent market analysis discussing the future of Bitcoin: "Will Bitcoin's current bull run reach its peak or is there a potential for another significant surge in 2025?" The analysis reveals that Bitcoin's current trading price is around $106,000.
news.headline: FBS analysts question if Bitcoin's bull run has peaked, as it trades at $106,000. The future rally potential is debated.

news.summary: Life Time Arden has continued its 70-year legacy of promoting health and wellness through a major renovation project in SACRAMENTO, Calif., starting on June 27, 2025. As part of this initiative, Life Time (NYSE: LTH), a leading healthy lifestyle brand in the country, has unveiled the initial phase of the multi-million-dollar transformation.
news.headline: Life Time opens 8th California club in Sacramento on June 27, amplifying 70-year tradition with multimillion-dollar renovation.

news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, on June 27, 2025, the multinational company Avantor, Inc., known for supplying critical products and services to clients in life sciences and advanced technology fields, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The results are set to be disclosed prior to the end of the quarter, showcasing the company's progress and financial standing during this period. Avantor, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AVTR, operates globally and plays a significant role in supporting industries crucial for societal advancement.
news.headline: Avantor to release Q2 2025 financial results on 8/1/25. Leading global provider to life sciences and tech industries.

news.summary: On Friday morning, the cryptocurrency market saw a slight downturn as Bitcoin (BTC) struggled to surpass the $107,000 threshold, currently priced at $107,151.6. Ethereum (ETH) stood at $2,454.9, Solana (SOL) at $142.2, XRP at $2.09, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.1611, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001123. Notable statistical data revealed a 7.2% drop in large transaction volume for Bitcoin and a 0.5% increase for Ethereum. Daily active addresses for BTC rose by 2.5% while those for ETH fell by 13.6%. Over the past 24 hours, 82,822 traders were liquidated, amounting to $193.17 million, according to Coinglass data. SoSoValue data indicated $228.15 million net inflows into spot Bitcoin ETFs, contrasting with net outflows of $26.5 million for Spot Ethereum ETFs on Thursday. Notably, despite thin spot volumes and weak speculative drive, the market's strength remains uncertain as Bitcoin faces resistance near $107,000.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency market slightly down before inflation data release, with BTC at $107,151.6, ETH at $2,454.9, XRP at $2.09, DOGE at $0.1611, notable drops in large transaction volumes and liquidations.

news.summary: XWELL, a prominent wellness company, is expanding its reach in the industry, with a focus on taking self-care to new heights. This expansion includes the opening of several new locations and forging key partnerships to enhance their wellness offerings. news.summary: On June 27, 2025, a prominent company known as VNET Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: VNET), operating in China as a top carrier- and cloud-neutral internet data center services provider, shared exciting news. The company expressed its assurance in the future progress and potential growth of VNET.
news.headline: VNET authorizes $50M share repurchase program to show confidence in future growth; leading internet data center in China.

news.summary: In Ashburn, Virginia, on June 27, 2025, Abich Financial Services Inc. (AFS) announced their certification as a Great Place To Work® (GPTW®) company. AFS achieved a remarkable employee satisfaction rate, with 100% of their employees stating that it is an excellent workplace environment. This exceeds the national average of 57%. The Great Place To Work Certification is a prestigious accolade that reflects the positive workplace culture and employee experience at AFS.
news.headline: Abich Financial earns 2025 Great Place To Work Certification with 100% employee satisfaction, surpassing national average.

news.summary: Marqeta, Inc., a leading modern card issuing platform traded on NASDAQ as MQ, will be conducting a conference call and webcast to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, August 6, 2025, at 4:30 pm ET, with Mike Milotich, the Interim CEO and CFO, leading the discussion. Following the call, a press release containing the Q2 2025 financial results will be released after the market closes.
news.headline: Marqeta to unveil Q2 2025 results on Aug 6, 2025; conference call with CEO Mike Milotich at 4:30 pm ET.

news.summary: In Milpitas, California, SS8 Networks, a prominent player in Lawful and Location Intelligence and Monitoring center platforms, has disclosed its acquisition by Mill Point Capital LLC. This development signifies a noteworthy achievement in SS8's advancement, aiming to drive penetration into fresh markets and fortify its technological infrastructure with a focus on AI-powered advancements. The acquisition will also serve to enrich its fundamental services in mediation, criminal monitoring, and investigative solutions.
news.headline: Lawful and Location Intelligence firm SS8 Networks acquired by Mill Point Capital LLC, enhancing tech stack and expanding into new markets.

news.summary: Schrödinger, Inc. revealed today that their clinical stage MALT1 inhibitor, SGR-1505, has been granted Fast Track designation by the FDA for treating adult patients with Waldenström macroglobulinemia who have not responded to at least two lines of therapy, including a Bruton’s tyrosine kinase (BTK) inhibitor. The Fast Track designation highlights the urgent requirement for new treatment options in patients. Schrödinger, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq as SDGR.
news.headline: Schrödinger's SGR-1505 has Fast Track designation from FDA for treating Waldenström macroglobulinemia. $SDGR #MedicalInnovation

news.summary: Lightspeed Financial Services Group LLC, based in Morristown, N.J., has introduced a new feature on its Lightspeed Trader platform allowing clients to trade U.S. stocks and ETFs around the clock. Traders can now execute trades on U.S. securities 24 hours a day for five days a week, starting on Sunday at 8:00 PM ET until Friday at 8:00 PM ET, excluding holidays and partial trading days. This enhancement offers global traders the opportunity to engage in continuous trading of U.S. securities.
news.headline: Lightspeed now supports 24/5 trading of US stocks & ETFs on Lightspeed Trader, allowing trades from Sunday 8:00 PM ET to Friday 8:00 PM ET.

news.summary: In San Francisco, companies Miraomics, Pythia Biosciences, and LatchBio have jointly unveiled a groundbreaking project - a massive 30 million cell atlas. This atlas covers more than 150 indications, 200 tissue types, and integrates 27 measurement technologies. The data was meticulously curated from public sources. Despite the wealth of information with millions of single cell transcriptomes available online, a significant barrier has been the high costs associated with organizing and annotating this data for further analysis. This collaboration has brought together these scattered resources into a single, comprehensive repository, which now stands as the largest collection of single-cell RNA sequencing data available.
news.headline: Miraomics, Pythia Biosciences, and LatchBio unveil a 30M cell atlas from 150+ indications, 200 tissue types, and 27 techs.

news.summary: Experienced business owners have documented effective strategies from numerous thriving companies, offering AI resources and funding for upcoming entrepreneurs. This initiative, spearheaded by Audos in New York on June 27, 2025, aims to empower the next wave of entrepreneurs with the tools and capital needed for success. Through codifying successful methods, they are equipping everyday individuals to create million-dollar AI ventures.
news.headline: Audos secures $11.5M to support entrepreneurs in creating million-dollar AI businesses, offering tools and capital.

news.summary: A team of underdog champions from the small town of Frankfort High School in Northern Michigan, boasting only 131 students, has gained nationwide acclaim for their exceptional season and recently formed partnership with GameAbove Sports. This collaboration has propelled the team to break records and achieve unprecedented success, showcasing the power of dedication and teamwork in high school sports.
news.headline: Small Frankfort HS with 131 students shines at Nike Nationals backed by GameAbove Sports, making headlines for record-breaking season.

news.summary: In a remarkable achievement, the Immutable-powered game TOKYO BEAST surged to the top spot on the Japan App Store just 48 hours after its launch, attracting an impressive 300,000 downloads. This milestone sets a new standard in the Web3 gaming sector. Japan's gaming market, valued at $27 billion, is among the most significant globally, making this feat even more remarkable.
news.headline: Web3 game TOKYO BEAST reaches #1 on Japan App Store with 300,000+ downloads in 48 hours, setting industry record. Japan gaming market valued at $27 billion.

news.summary: In the latest financial report, a total revenue of $15.6 million was recorded, showing a significant rise of $5.7 million or 58% compared to the previous year's quarter. The net income for this quarter reached $0.9 million, marking a substantial increase of $15.5 million from the same period last year. Additionally, the adjusted EBITDA stood at $4.0 million, demonstrating a notable surge of $2.4 million or 158% compared to the prior year quarter. The company's performance in the fourth quarter reflects a positive trend in direct sales and operational efficiency.
news.headline: Cineverse reports strong financial results, with $15.6M in total revenue, $0.9M net income, and $4.0M EBITDA in Q4 2025.

news.summary: In San Francisco on June 27, 2025, Bolt unveiled a new product called Bolt Connect aiming to assist marketplaces in quicker onboarding of merchants, enhancing operations efficiency, and scaling with reduced resources. news.summary: On June 27, 2025, PriceSmart, Inc. revealed plans to reschedule its conference call for the third quarter fiscal results of 2025. news.summary: The recipients of the EPEAT award have combined efforts to decrease the collective carbon footprint by more than 500,000 metric tons of CO2 equivalent, demonstrating a significant reduction in the environmental impact of technology. Recently, Geotab Inc., a prominent provider of connected vehicle solutions and asset management on a global scale, was acknowledged for their contributions. This recognition serves as a testament to their commitment to sustainability and environmental responsibility.
news.headline: Geotab awarded for sustainable electronics procurement, EPEAT winners cut 500,000 metric tons of CO2(eq), reducing tech impact.

news.summary: In a recent announcement made on June 27, 2025, Bastien Perrot, the CEO of Exclusive Healthcare, was recognized by Business Worldwide Magazine as the recipient of the "Insurance Brokerage CEO of the Year" award in the Expat Healthcare Segment category. This prestigious accolade is part of the 2025 CEO Awards by Business Worldwide Magazine, designed to honor exceptional leaders in various industries. Bastien Perrot's achievement highlights his notable contributions to the field and underscores his success in the specialized area of expat healthcare. This recognition showcases his leadership and expertise, further solidifying Exclusive Healthcare's position in the market.
news.headline: Bastien Perrot of Exclusive Healthcare wins Business Worldwide Magazine's 2025 CEO Award for "Insurance Brokerage CEO of the Year."

news.summary: A fast-growing Hybrid RIA is shifting to Cambridge to access greater flexibility, more personalized support, and a highly collaborative culture between the home office and larger enterprises. This new partnership will allow the firm to broaden affiliation models for The AmeriFlex Group's advisors at all career stages, fostering expansion opportunities.

news.summary: Today, CorMedix Inc. (Nasdaq: CRMD) in Berkeley Heights, N.J., a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing and selling therapeutic products for critical diseases, disclosed the pricing of its recent underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 6,604,507 shares of its common stock, aiming to generate around $85 million in total gross proceeds for the Company. Furthermore, CorMedix has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to an additional 15% of the common stock shares offered. The closing of the offering is anticipated to take place by June 30, 2025, contingent upon meeting standard closing conditions.
news.headline: CorMedix Inc. prices public offering at 6,604,507 shares, expected to raise $85 million. Underwriters have option for 15% more.

news.summary: An initial amount of $5.0 million was raised in upfront gross proceeds, with the potential for an additional $9.8 million in gross proceeds if all private placement warrants are fully exercised in cash.
news.headline: Lyra Therapeutics launching $15 million offering & concurrent private placement priced at-the-market under Nasdaq rules, including $5 million upfront gross proceeds & potential $9.8 million more from full warrant exercise.

With this partnership, a substantial increase in international expansion and market diversification is anticipated, promising a positive trajectory for global growth initiatives.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, Apollo (NYSE: APO) announced that it will unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on August 5, 2025, before the commencement of trading on the New York Stock Exchange.
